articles.title: 墨西哥感到自豪，但退出世界杯后“受伤”
articles.summary: 墨西哥队主教练哈维尔·阿吉雷表示，周日晚上在阿兹台克球场以 3-2 输给英格兰队，被淘汰出世界杯后，他感到自豪，但也感到受伤。
articles.originalTitle: Mexico proud, but 'hurt' after exiting World Cup
articles.originalSummary: Mexico manager Javier Aguirre said he feels proud but hurt after being eliminated from the FIFA World Cup with a 3-2 loss against England on Sunday night at the Estadio Azteca.

articles.title: 特朗普：我请因凡蒂诺“审查”巴洛贡红
articles.summary: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普周一表示，他致电国际足联主席詹尼·因凡蒂诺，以审查美国国家队前锋福拉林·巴洛贡在球队对阵波黑的比赛中收到的红牌，称这是一个“可怕”的电话。
articles.originalTitle: Trump: I asked Infantino to 'review' Balogun red
articles.originalSummary: President Donald Trump said Monday he called FIFA president Gianni Infantino to review the red card given to USMNT striker Folarin Balogun in the team's match against Bosnia-Herzegovina, calling it a "horrible" call.

articles.title: 国际足联拒绝比利时的请求；巴洛贡可以玩
articles.summary: 国际足联已将比利时足协要求对福拉林·巴洛贡停赛红牌作出解释的请求裁定为“不可接受”，这意味着国际足联没有理由对这一决定提出上诉，而这位美国前锋仍然可以接受
articles.originalTitle: FIFA reject Belgium request; Balogun can play
articles.originalSummary: FIFA has ruled a request from the Belgium federation for an explanation of Folarin Balogun's suspended red card as "inadmissible," meaning it has no grounds to appeal the decision and the U.S. forward remains cleared to

articles.title: 欧足联：国际足联对巴洛贡的禁令跨越了“红线”
articles.summary: 欧足联强烈批评国际足联决定暂停美国国家队前锋福拉林·巴洛贡的红牌，从而允许美国前锋参加世界杯16强对阵比利时的比赛。
articles.originalTitle: UEFA: FIFA crossed 'red line' on Balogun ban
articles.originalSummary: UEFA have strongly criticized FIFA's decision to suspend USMNT striker Folarin Balogun's red card, thus allowing the United States striker to be available for the World Cup round-of-16 match against Belgium.

articles.title: 内马尔在世界杯退出后含泪从巴西退役
articles.summary: 内马尔情绪激动地表示，在巴西队周日在世界杯16强中被挪威淘汰后，他在巴西的职业生涯已经“结束”。
articles.originalTitle: Tearful Neymar retires from Brazil after WC exit
articles.originalSummary: An emotional Neymar said his career with Brazil had "finished" after his team's World Cup exit at the hands of Norway in the round of 16 on Sunday.

articles.title: 🏆2026-27 UCL 赛季在世界杯中期开始
articles.summary: 新的欧冠联赛将在上赛季决赛结束 38 天后开始。许多默默无闻的俱乐部都参与其中，每个俱乐部都有自己引人入胜的故事。
articles.originalSummary: The new Champions League campaign begins 38 days after last season's final. Plenty of unheralded clubs are involved, all with their own fascinating stories.

articles.title: 朱利安尼：国际足联审查不会影响美国国家队的遗产
articles.summary: 白宫世界杯特别工作组负责人安德鲁·朱利安尼周一对 ESPN 表示，他对国际足联减少福拉林·巴洛贡停赛影响遗产或信誉的决定完全不担心

articles.originalSummary: Andrew Giuliani, the head of the White House task force on the World Cup, told ESPN on Monday that he has no concerns at all over FIFA's decision to reduce Folarin Balogun's suspension affecting the legacy or credibility

articles.title: 为什么国际足联的巴洛贡逆转是一个令人不安的决定......
articles.summary: 对于美国国家队的球迷来说，在国际足联取消弗拉林·巴洛贡的禁赛令后观看他对阵比利时的比赛会感觉有点奇怪——一种混合着喜悦和严重不安的感觉。
articles.originalTitle: Why FIFA's Balogun reversal is an uncomfortable de...
articles.originalSummary: For USMNT fans, seeing Folarin Balogun play against Belgium after FIFA rescinded his suspension will feel a bit odd -- a jumble of joy tinged with a heavy slice of unease.
